task_completion.description: Verify that two tracks named 'Left Whisper' and 'Right Whisper' have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ardour timeline or mixer view, look for two track headers with the exact names 'Left Whisper' and 'Right Whisper'.

task_completion.description: Verify that audio has been imported into both tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for audio regions containing waveforms on the timeline for both the 'Left Whisper' and 'Right Whisper' tracks.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tracks are hard-panned left and right.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the pan controls in the track headers or mixer. The 'Left Whisper' track should be panned fully to the left (L), and the 'Right Whisper' track should be panned fully to the right (R).

task_completion.description: Verify that one track is offset relative to the other to create the Haas effect.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the alignment of the audio regions on the timeline. The start of the audio region on one track should be slightly shifted horizontally (delayed) compared to the other track.

task_completion.description: Verify that the volume of both tracks has been reduced to a whisper level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the volume faders in the mixer or track headers. Both faders should be pulled down significantly below the 0dB mark (expected between -11dB and -25dB).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Ardour session has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Ardour window title bar; it should display a session name without an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk), or look for a screenshot showing the 'Save' dialog being completed.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the Ardour GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour application open with visible mouse clicks, window interactions, or menus being used.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply edit the Ardour session XML file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of a text editor modifying `.ardour` files to bypass GUI interaction.

integrity.description: Verify that the results are from genuine Ardour usage.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waveforms, track controls, and mixer should be rendered by Ardour, not mocked up or simulated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source audio is '/home/ga/Audio/client_files/narration.wav'. The tracks must be hard-panned (left pan <= 0.2, right pan >= 0.8). The Haas delay offset should be between 200 and 8800 samples (roughly 5ms to 200ms). The volume gain should be reduced to between -25 dB and -11 dB.
